title: Runtime Device Identity via ubus
description: Canonical pattern for identifying a running OpenWrt device from live system state using `ubus call system board` instead of reconstructing build tuples or scraping implementation-specific files.
when_to_use: Use when a script, LuCI component, upgrader, or external tool needs to determine the current device model, board identifier, target, release, or rootfs type from a running OpenWrt system.
verification_basis: Verified against current procd checkout at cd7a4e5; procd/system.c implementation of `system.board`; archive thread Uniquely identifying a platform programmatically; current OpenWrt examples that report `ubus call system board` in diagnostics
